---
layout: default
title: "Parliamentary Legislative Updates and Political Developments"
date: 2026-06-26T11:19:27.856245+00:00
summary: "Parliament passes the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, Jharkhand Rajya Sabha election fallout, and ongoing debates over NCERT curriculum changes"
run_time_ist: "4:49PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:49PM</p>

<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary activity:</strong> The Rajya Sabha passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, while the Lok Sabha initiated discussions on the Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill and the Delimitation Bill.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxNekwzdlZWMTFtYkpIR3JwVWxLQXk1d0NBb2FSdHJpRmtYeGQ5b3NsVFRPSFBrMUVFZTg1eHRHenFVbTdQV3V6SzF0TWl5S0VKc1pOOExxaVctVmtKdEpjSFowbTNPRHNqcndfakJ1WDVxQUVjaWN1RkVUN3FnNFVFNVIzRGxyekZiYk9MWGR5VWZmbW5nWXg4bS1RWVA?oc=5">I7</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Jharkhand Rajya Sabha polls:</strong> Tensions have emerged within the INDIA bloc as the Congress accused the RJD and CPI(ML) of betrayal during the recent Rajya Sabha elections, despite RJD claims that its MLAs supported the coalition candidate.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivgFBVV95cUxOdzlLY2FaVUFtZ1p3Y2RxYXBzdGppYkR1aEFaTnllWnllS00zWHFsR2FtY1hNWElRb1FqcVRubXdQcmRIazE5REdqZDdtTFpwLThSSVBqVmRaSlNiaDU0WlNKa1BRN0tQQ040RGVFdGV6Qkllb2Z6dTdvNW56eVhONUNRbm9aU3I3SmpaejNJNVlKVU9xaXI0bTRHTEFiSTlrNFZTd1lqTE5iek85U1JITmZ5M2tPLWFvREdGMzlB?oc=5">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxPYUpSNHBpa2g5dEZPN1dKVVJvQWQtc21JRmNQckg4TGp0UFpIcGlOdFJubzhFenRjY2VvbUFiT2poWnJUcGhTWEZBUE5RV1hyZVJBZk5mNXR6ZXY4aXdTRXBLd1ZDcHgwLTE5eVJoR3ZpWWc4NXlqeVphM18wVWhMOEtuN0NrS1hLekNwVS1Zbng3LU5ObHRNX1lEVjY5R1VfN05LRG0tTnpMUQ?oc=5">I2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial and electoral updates:</strong> The Supreme Court dismissed Meenakshi Natarajan’s plea challenging the rejection of her Rajya Sabha nomination, while the BJP secured wins in recent Rajya Sabha elections.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxOcUhTUWg1dGk0U1JYaXhWU2VCejVsaHNEVmNVMkdzZEZFRUVTYWhIZXktVk1ZeXZSYXVTdVZsSVJDU3ZoOFdIcGZMQl9wMmlTWmtXdEZxNGMwLVlCbVM5cjFHbE92VVFYVTVsSV9fYUVRZmZIZW4tYy0tU3NzUXVVRExEbUhEWDA3ZHVIVHQ0b1VIaXJkMmdzYnpKQU41WktXa3JNUUo3NVhQMTQ?oc=5">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxPRE1WWUttLTZsQ0lPbFl1NFBDamx2Q1BtR1pUT2VUWnJObFNGT1ViUFUxNUNlem9NOEFMQjNYbzJ4ZEZvREpFYjVLdGs0U21XZGxScWFpTktLeG1xaU4xdFowMEJwSmlWbHZhSTVaUy0yNVRwazI5VFhxS0ZKekM2X3B1U24tOUpwMUkxejdOaFE3T0JaRDExYTdDV0U4TTNlTTR4b1B1TVY5MV90dFpHaXVBNlNqSUJZNWc?oc=5">I10</a></span></li>
</ul>
<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>NCERT curriculum controversy:</strong> The Congress party has criticized the inclusion of a new section on the Election Commission in Class 9 NCERT textbooks, alleging the government is distorting history for political gain.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">W4</a></span></li>
</ul>
